title: MinecraftAdditions
description:
This mod add some new ores,armor and template. Craft the wiki to discover all the secrets of the mod.Add also some new feaure, tag,variable,biomes and some other.
Download it to discover what this mod add, I'M PLANNING TO ORT THE MOD IN 1.21.5.
body:
This mod add some new ores and armors.![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/858b1fde89f300685fa2e2555ac3f7829fa4c1cd.png)
This mod is based on the texture made by trique with some other additions.
![Additions.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5f0781bfa594c2d8df0f7d55c35b30c05283dc6.png)

This mod is an Unofficial fork for Forge and Neofrge for MythicUpgrades mod, BUT THIS MOD ADD SOME NEW FATURES LIKE WEAPONS UPGRADES WITH NEW TEMPLATES, 5 NEW SET(+ THE MYTHICUPGRADES SET.) SO THERE ISN'T THE FULL ARMOR EFFECT LIKE THE MYTHICUPGRADES AND I'M DEVELOPING THIS MOD WITH MCREATOR SO EVERY TIME THE PROGRAM WIL UPDATE I'LL UPDATE THE MOD TO THE NEWEST VERSION.
SO HAVE FUN TIER1234

FEATURES COMING IN X.2.0(THE X IF FOR A NUMBER: 4 IS FOR 1.21.4 3 IS FOR 1.21.1 AND 2 IS FOR 1.20.1)
- ADDING NEW WOODSET WICH SAPWN IN END AND SOME NEW COOL FEATURES.
- ADDING A NEW GUI FOR SEE THE CHANGELOG IN GAME
- ADDING NEW ITEM SIMILIAR TO BACKPACK AND MORE.
- THE UPDATE WILL BE AVAIBLE SOON. STAY TUNED IN MY DISCORD SERVER CHECK IT DOWN BELOW.



For any issue che the discord link below.

Check Out my **_[DISCORD](https://discord.gg/KCyWKd8n)_** server 

This is a mod based on MythicUpgrades mod made by @trique but with some new additions. Check out the [MythicUpgrades](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythic-upgrades) pages.
